2024-06-25T16:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Wong Tai Sin MTR Station is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-06-25T16:39:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近黃大仙港鐵站的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-06-25T17:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Wong Tai Sin MTR Station is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes is available to motorists. Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) ends at Lung Cheung Road near Lung Cheung Road Lookout. Traffic is congested now.
2024-06-25T17:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近黃大仙港鐵站的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在龍翔道(往觀塘方向)的車龍龍尾已到龍翔道近龍翔道眺望處。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-06-25T17:16:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Wong Tai Sin MTR Station is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes is available to motorists.   Citizens please take note KMB's service travelling via Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) has been affected, citizens please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.   Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) ends at Lung Cheung Road near Beacon Heights.   Traffic is congested now.
2024-06-25T17:16:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近黃大仙港鐵站的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  市民請留意九巴途經龍翔道往觀塘方向的服務會受影響，市民請考慮使用其他公共交通服務，例如港鐵服務。  現時在龍翔道(往觀塘方向)的車龍龍尾已到龍翔道近畢架山花園。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-06-25T17:33:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Wong Tai Sin MTR Station is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes is available to motorists.   Citizens please take note KMB's service travelling via Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) is still being affected, citizens please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.   Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) ends at Ching Cheung Road near So Uk.   Traffic is congested now.
